task_completion.description: Verify the Delft_TU ground station was created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Station' configuration dialog or list showing 'Delft_TU' with Latitude 52.0116, Longitude 4.3571, and Altitude 5m.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tokyo_Tech ground station was created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Station' configuration dialog or list showing 'Tokyo_Tech' with Latitude 35.6042, Longitude 139.6837, and Altitude 26m.

task_completion.description: Verify the CalPoly_SLO ground station was created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Station' configuration dialog or list showing 'CalPoly_SLO' with Latitude 35.3050, Longitude 120.6625 W (or -120.6625), and Altitude 96m.

task_completion.description: Verify the EuropeSats module is created, assigned to Delft_TU, and contains the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'EuropeSats'. It should display the ground station 'Delft_TU' and list satellites FUNCUBE-1 (AO-73) and DELFI-C3 (DO-64).

task_completion.description: Verify the JapanSats module is created, assigned to Tokyo_Tech, and contains the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'JapanSats'. It should display the ground station 'Tokyo_Tech' and list satellites CUTE-1 (CO-55), XI-IV (CO-57), and SEEDS II (CO-66).

task_completion.description: Verify the AmericaSats module is created, assigned to CalPoly_SLO, and contains the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'AmericaSats'. It should display the ground station 'CalPoly_SLO' and list satellites AO-91 (Fox-1B) and AO-92 (Fox-1D).

task_completion.description: Verify the existing Amateur module was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Amateur' module tab or window still present in the GPredict main interface alongside the newly created modules.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the ground stations and modules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes (like 'Edit Ground Station' or 'Module properties') being interacted with, rather than terminal windows editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict interface should be visible, including its standard menus, maps, and satellite tracking views, not a mocked interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running Python or bash scripts to inject the QTH or module files directly into the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Stations to verify: 1) Delft_TU: Lat 52.0116, Lon 4.3571, Alt 5m. 2) Tokyo_Tech: Lat 35.6042, Lon 139.6837, Alt 26m. 3) CalPoly_SLO: Lat 35.305, Lon -120.6625 (or 120.6625 W), Alt 96m. Modules to verify: 1) EuropeSats: Assigned to Delft_TU, contains NORAD 39444 (FUNCUBE-1) and 32789 (DELFI-C3). 2) JapanSats: Assigned to Tokyo_Tech, contains NORAD 27844 (CUTE-1), 27848 (XI-IV), and 32791 (SEEDS II). 3) AmericaSats: Assigned to CalPoly_SLO, contains NORAD 43017 (AO-91) and 43137 (AO-92).
